reviews.comment:
Tuve la mala suerte de quedarme con el auto en Chascomús,iba para el Aeropuerto de Eseisa.Perdia el vuelo y la estadía en Brazil.Llame al servicio de auxilio le expliqué mi problema en 45 minutos enviaron el auxilio lo cargo y lo trasladó a Mar del Plata al taller mecánico de mi confianza.Me llamaron de asistencia al viajero enviaron un remis para que nos llevará al aeropuerto todo pago por el ACA, en resumen no perdí el vuelo ni tampoco la estadía en Brazil muy agradecido

(Translated by Google)
I had the misfortune of my car breaking down in Chascomús. I was on my way to Esseix Airport. I was going to miss my flight and my stay in Brazil. I called roadside assistance and explained my problem. In 45 minutes, they sent a tow truck, loaded it, and took it to my trusted mechanic in Mar del Plata. Travel assistance called me and sent a taxi to take us to the airport, all paid for by the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). In short, I didn't miss my flight or my stay in Brazil. I'm very grateful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBajhPaVB3EAE
